Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Setup Feature Flag and Configuration
Title: User able to see Notes section in CDP Contact Detail when enabled_note_cdp flag is ON
Preconditions:
- Device: Android/iOS
- C360 mode: enabled
- Firebase: enabled_note_cdp = true
- User has customers_customernotes_view permission
- Navigate to CDP Contact Detail
Steps:
1. Launch CRM Mobile app
2. Navigate to Contacts list
3. Tap a CDP contact to open Contact Detail
4. Scroll to 'Other' tab and locate Notes section
Expected Result: Notes section is visible in the 'Other' tab

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Data/Domain Layer: Get Notes List
Title: User able to see notes loaded from CDP API in the Notes section
Preconditions:
- C360 mode: enabled
- enabled_note_cdp = true
- Contact has 3+ existing notes
- User has customers_customernotes_view permission
Steps:
1. Navigate to CDP Contact Detail
2. Open 'Other' tab
3. Wait for Notes section to load
Expected Result: Notes list displays notes fetched from GET /contacts/{id}/notes API with correct text and metadata

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Presentation Layer: List BLoC
Title: User able to see correct metadata on each note card (creator, timestamp, edited badge)
Preconditions:
- Notes list loaded in CDP mode
- At least 1 edited note and 1 new note
Steps:
1. Navigate to Notes section
2. View each note card
Expected Result: Each note card shows: creator display name, creation timestamp, and '(edited)' badge if note was modified

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Integration: List Screen
Title: User able to navigate to Notes section and see notes list in CDP Contact Detail
Preconditions:
- C360 mode ON, enabled_note_cdp = true
- User logged in with view permission
- Contact has 2+ notes
Steps:
1. Open CRM Mobile app
2. Navigate to Contacts
3. Tap a CDP contact
4. Scroll to Notes section in 'Other' tab
Expected Result: Notes section visible and populated with notes from CDP API

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Integration: List Screen
Title: User with customers_customernotes_add permission sees Create Note (+) button
Preconditions: - User has customers_customernotes_add permission
Steps: 1. Navigate to Notes section
Expected Result: Create note button ('+' or FAB) is visible and tappable in Notes section

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Data/Domain Layer: Create Note
Title: User able to successfully create a text-only note and see it appear in notes list
Preconditions:
- User has customers_customernotes_add permission
- Notes list screen visible
Steps:
1. Tap '+' button to open Create Note screen
2. Type 'Meeting notes: discuss Q2 targets'
3. Tap Save
Expected Result: Success toast shown; new note 'Meeting notes: discuss Q2 targets' visible at top of list

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Integration: Create Screen
Title: User able to open Create Note screen and type text in rich text editor
Preconditions:
- On Notes list screen
- User has create permission
Steps:
1. Tap '+' button on Notes section
2. Tap inside text editor
3. Type 'Hello World'
Expected Result: Create Note screen opens; 'Hello World' appears in editor field

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Integration: Create Screen
Title: User able to save note and see success toast 'Success to save the note.'
Preconditions: - Text entered in editor
Steps:
1. Type 'Test note content'
2. Tap Save button
Expected Result: Toast message 'Success to save the note.' shown; screen navigates back to notes list

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Toolbar: FileUploadToolbarButton (ImageUpload API Logic)
Title: User able to tap file upload toolbar button and open file picker
Preconditions: - Create Note screen open
Steps: 1. Tap file upload toolbar button in editor toolbar
Expected Result: File picker opens; user can browse device files

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Toolbar: VoiceUploadToolbarButton (Files n Voices Upload API Logic)
Title: User able to tap voice upload button and select an audio file (mp3/m4a)
Preconditions:
- Create Note screen open
- MP3 file available on device
Steps:

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Data/Domain Layer: Update Note
Title: User able to edit existing note text and see updated content in list

- User has customers_customernotes_manage permission on that note

2. Modify text to 'Updated meeting discussion'
3. Tap Save
Expected Result: Note shows 'Updated meeting discussion' in list; '(edited)' indicator visible

Ticket Title: [Fltr] Note CDP - Integration: Update Screen
